items.description: Cowork is at its best on work that’s too big for a chat: research across dozens of accounts, recurring reports, triaging my inbox and drafting replies. If you’ve been curious, this is a good month to find out what it can take off your plat…
items.description_zh: Cowork 在处理对于聊天来说太大的工作时效果最好：对数十个帐户进行研究、定期报告、对收件箱进行分类并起草回复。如果您很好奇，这是一个很好的月份，可以了解它可以为您带来哪些好处……

items.title: We doubled Claude Cowork usage limits for the next month.
